description: VFX Pipeline — declarative attachment system for wiring 3DFX effects to weapon skills. Defines WHERE an effect spawns, HOW it travels, WHAT happens on arrival, and HOW LONG it lasts. Used by the weapon prefab editor and runtime skill system.

origins.description: Where the VFX spawns. Every VFX starts at an origin.

weapon_tip.label: Weapon Tip
weapon_tip.description: End of the equipped weapon mesh. For projectile launch, spell cast from staff tip.

weapon_edge.label: Weapon Edge / Trail
weapon_edge.description: Along the cutting edge of the weapon. Follows the swing arc during animation.

weapon_back.label: Weapon Back / Spine
weapon_back.description: Back side of the weapon. For charging effects, runic glow, enchant particles.

offhand.label: Offhand / Shield / Tome
offhand.description: Left hand container. For tome spells, shield effects, offhand cast.

caster_center.label: Caster Body Center
caster_center.description: Center mass of the caster. For auras, buffs, self-heals.

caster_feet.label: Caster Feet
caster_feet.description: Ground level at caster position. For ground slam, shockwave origin.

caster_above.label: Above Caster
caster_above.description: 2-3 units above caster head. For rain of arrows, meteor call, holy beam.

caster_forward.label: In Front of Caster
caster_forward.description: 1-2 units ahead in facing direction. For breath attacks, cone effects.

target_position.label: Target Entity
target_position.description: Center of the targeted enemy/ally. For targeted spells, debuffs.

target_feet.label: Target Feet / Ground
target_feet.description: Ground under target. For root, trap, ground fire.

ground_cursor.label: Ground Cursor / AoE Indicator
ground_cursor.description: Where the player is aiming on the ground (mouse world position). For ground-targeted AoE.

sky.label: Sky / Above World
sky.description: High above the target area. For effects that rain down (meteor, lightning).

travel.description: How the VFX moves from origin to destination. Not all VFX travel — some are instant or stay at origin.

instant.label: Instant / No Travel
instant.description: Appears at origin immediately. For melee hits, buffs, auras.

projectile_linear.label: Linear Projectile
projectile_linear.description: Travels in a straight line from origin toward target at constant speed.

projectile_arc.label: Arced Projectile
projectile_arc.description: Travels in a parabolic arc from origin to target. For lobbed spells, grenades.

projectile_homing.label: Homing Projectile
projectile_homing.description: Seeks toward target, adjusting direction each frame. For magic missiles, tracking bolts.

beam.label: Beam / Ray
beam.description: Continuous line from origin to target. Stays connected while channeling.

expand_ring.label: Expanding Ring
expand_ring.description: Ring expands outward from origin at constant speed.

fall_from_sky.label: Fall From Sky
fall_from_sky.description: Travels from sky origin straight down to ground target.

follow_entity.label: Follow Entity
follow_entity.description: Stays attached to an entity and moves with it. For persistent auras and buffs.

follow_swing.label: Follow Weapon Swing
follow_swing.description: Traces along the weapon arc during attack animation. For slash trails.

chain_bounce.label: Chain / Bounce
chain_bounce.description: Jumps from target to nearby targets. For chain lightning, bouncing heal.

arrival.description: What happens when the VFX reaches its destination or completes its travel.

none.label: None / Dissipate
none.description: VFX fades out at destination. No additional effect.

explode.label: Explode
explode.description: Burst into AoE damage/particles on arrival. Triggers a secondary AoE VFX.

impact_burst.label: Impact Burst
impact_burst.description: Short flash/particles at hit point. For direct-hit confirmation.

stick.label: Stick to Target
stick.description: VFX attaches to the target entity. For DoTs, debuffs, poison.

bounce.label: Bounce / Ricochet
bounce.description: Reflects off target and seeks next target. For chain effects.

pool.label: Leave Ground Pool
pool.description: Creates a persistent area on the ground. For fire patches, frost zones.

spawn_secondary.label: Spawn Secondary VFX
spawn_secondary.description: Triggers another VFX on arrival. For combo effects (projectile→explosion→shockwave).

knockback.label: Knockback
knockback.description: Pushes target away from impact. Pairs with shockwave/slam VFX.

timing.description: Duration and lifecycle of the VFX.

instant.label: Instant (0.1-0.3s)
instant.description: Flash effect. One frame burst, rapid fade.

short.label: Short (0.3-1.0s)
short.description: Quick effect with fade. Melee slash trails, projectile travel.

medium.label: Medium (1.0-3.0s)
medium.description: Visible effect with clear lifecycle. Spell explosions, AoE nova.

long.label: Long (3.0-8.0s)
long.description: Persistent effect. Ground pools, channeled spells, DoTs.

persistent.label: Persistent (until cancelled)
persistent.description: Stays until explicitly removed. Auras, toggled buffs, portals.

match_animation.label: Match Animation Duration
match_animation.description: VFX duration matches the skill animation length. Auto-synced.
